title: How to send empty Lead Owner / User through API on make.com?
excerpt:
Hi, 
I’m making data migration and I don’t have some users on Monday. Thats why I cannot find their ID. 
I need to send an empty field for Lead Owner. 
It just doesn’t allow me to send any empty field, how can I do that? …

posts.author: onurbolaca (Onur)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m making data migration and I don’t have some users on Monday. Thats why I cannot find their ID.

I need to send an empty field for Lead Owner.

It just doesn’t allow me to send any empty field, how can I do that?

image780×876 42.8 KB

image721×347 30.1 KB

image924×492 21.9 KB

@alessandra @Matias.Monday ??

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @onurbolaca,

I am sorry for the late reply.

Did you manage to solve this?

If not, could you please provide screenshots of your entire flow?

posts.author: onurbolaca (Onur)
posts.cookedHtml: It has been sometime. I have found what was the mistake but I don’t remember exactly. But it is not possible to send empty person through make.com , I think that’s something it should be fixed for make.com because I needed to create two different flows just for this reason and spend more operations just for this reason.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again,

Thank you for sharing that with us!

I am glad you found the source of the issue.
